svg.title: Mindcraft: Multi-agent World Model for Continuous Learning Agents
svg.desc: A model architecture diagram for continual learning from Minecraft experience using replay, a selective SSM world model, JEPA latent prediction, finite scalar quantized latents, MuZero-style heads, MCTS planning, LoRA adaptation, and persistent checkpoints.
svg.metadata: Minecraft environment render: Cinematic Craft screenshot from Modrinth, licensed CC-BY-4.0 by the project creator. Source page: https://modrinth.com/modpack/cinematic-craft. Asset URL: https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d4323d0d849520b9cd19e46afabd77514fecd08.png. Minecraft is a trademark of Mojang/Microsoft; this diagram is not official or affiliated.
svg.text: Minecraft experience -> typed replay -> selective SSM + JEPA/FSQ latents -> imagined MCTS skills -> persistent adaptation
layers=3, latent_dim=16, FSQ bins=8, LoRA rank=4
every run improves skill values, replay, checkpoints, telemetry, and adaptation state

g.text: The next run resumes from disk, not from scratch.
pred_latent is trained with normalized smooth L1; target encoder follows EMA tau=0.01.

svg.text: Minecraft render in frames: Cinematic Craft screenshot from Modrinth, CC-BY-4.0. Diagram is a project figure and is not an official Minecraft service or Mojang/Microsoft asset.
